'''Chandrex Grenn''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Iotran/Legends|Iotran]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] active during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
Chandrex Grenn was a survivor of an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] research station captured by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]]. Grenn subsequently escaped custody and went in search of [[Chandrex Grenn's sister|his sister]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] who had been lost since the Alliance attacked an Imperial naval station at [[Shadren V]]. Operating as a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]], Grenn worked with fellow newcomer [[Sirenas Firil]] to track Alliance [[Agent/Legends|agent]] [[Pallas Quintell]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kallistas]] in order to receive a reward offered by [[Imperial Prefect|Prefect]] [[Dengless Rinn]]. The operation was a success, and the two hunters divided the reward. Later, stranded on the planet with recently arrived bounty hunter [[Demos Traxen]], they were hired again by Rinn to track [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Jondrell Inx]].
